message:
fix(quic): cap window sizes and add datagram error type

Config changes:
- Cap stream_receive_window and receive_window to u32::MAX
- Prevents VarInt overflow for large window configurations
- Add comment explaining the 2^62-1 VarInt limit

Error types:
- Add QuicError::Datagram variant for send_datagram errors
- From impl for quinn::SendDatagramError

These changes ensure the QUIC config doesn't produce invalid VarInts
and datagram operations have proper error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,10 @@ pub enum QuicError {
     #[error("read to end error: {0}")]
     ReadToEnd(#[from] quinn::ReadToEndError),
 
+    /// Error sending datagram.
+    #[error("datagram send error: {0}")]
+    Datagram(#[from] quinn::SendDatagramError),
+
     /// Stream was closed.
     #[error("stream closed")]
     StreamClosed,
